Website Sync Fixes — v7.42.1

Docs site at orchestkit.vercel.app was showing stale counts after v7.42.0 release.

SeverityLocationBeforeAfter
CRITHomepage PERSONAS card #2hardcoded "104 hooks"${COUNTS.hooks}
CRITHomepage PERSONAS card #3hardcoded "33 parallel specialist agents"${COUNTS.agents}
HIGHHomepage thumbnail alt textalt={comp.id} ("implementFeature")"Implement Feature — 30s demo"

MEDdemo-producer/template-system92 skills. 33 agents.103 skills. 36 agents.

Verified complete coverage

  • 103 skills → 103 MDX pages
  • 36 agents → 36 MDX + index
  • 173 hooks → 27 event pages covering all
